summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 open candidate PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard. Security-sensitive PRs #89592 and #89597 are routed to central security handling; remaining non-security PRs are kept open for maintainer review, author follow-up, or proof rather than closure/merge/fix actions, which are blocked by this job.

actions.reason: Useful maintainer-owned draft PR with proof and no duplicate/supersession evidence; keep open rather than close or merge.
Security-boundary-shaped PR must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling, with no close, merge, label, comment, or fix action from Clownfish.
Credential/auth-provider boundary work is security-sensitive for this workflow and must route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Narrow non-security gateway hardening PR has pending author/change state and no closure basis.
Open maintainer draft with review/proof gaps; keep open for follow-up instead of closing.
Low-proof performance PR is not closeable here because low-signal PR closeout is disabled; keep open as independent with proof blockers.
Useful maintainer draft PR with a focused follow-up suggestion; no duplicate or closure path is established.
Contributor PR appears useful and reviewable; merge is blocked by job frontmatter and no closure condition applies.
PR is related to hydrated issue #89532 but not merge-ready or closeout-ready due to failing proof checks.
